rationale: Both correctly diagnose the dummy-weight/run-level mismatch and cite the same core evidence (run_args.py default, _add_dummy_load_format in stage_config.py, PR #4354), matching the thread's actual 'invalid' resolution. X is more complete: it explicitly states the 'invalid' disposition matching ground truth, reasons about the A100-vs-H100/MI325 hardware_test mismatch (directly relevant since the issue title and resolution both hinge on A100), checks the video-path prerequisite, and proposes a concrete follow-up fixture-warning improvement. Y is accurate but terser, omits the A100 hardware nuance, and only says 'close' without specifying the invalid disposition.
